sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitstrings (id INTEGER, bitstring_value BIT(4));
INSERT INTO test_bitstrings (id, bitstring_value) VALUES (1, B'1010'), (2, B'1100'), (3, B'1111');
UPDATE test_bitstrings SET bitstring_value = B'0001' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bit_and(bitstring_value) AS resultant_bitstring FROM test_bitstrings GROUP BY id;
